expectations.evidence: 02-triage-classification.ps1 uses $Alert.most_recent_instance.location.path as the primary classification signal with 8 regex-based heuristics.
Identifies bare image refs (owner/image with no subpath), usr/local/lib/node_modules/npm/ as BASE_IMAGE_NPM_BUNDLED, and system lib paths as BASE_IMAGE_OS_PACKAGE.
Identifies app/node_modules/ as OUR_DEPENDENCY, Go module paths and /usr/bin/caddy as OUR_DEPENDENCY, Dockerfile DS-rules as OUR_DOCKERFILE_MISCONFIG.
04-remediation-commands.ps1 provides specific commands per category: bump FROM tag for base image, npm audit fix for node deps, cargo update for Rust, dismiss commands for won't_fix.
04-remediation-commands.ps1 uses dismissed_reason='won't_fix' for base image alerts with no upstream fix. Correct per the skill's valid values.

summary: All 5 assertions passed. The skill produced a comprehensive, project-aware triage system that correctly classifies alerts across all 5 Dockerfiles and provides actionable remediation per category.
